text: 481 - وَ سَأَلَ هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ شَارِبِ اَلْخَمْرِ وَ اَلزَّانِي وَ اَلسَّارِقِ يُصَلَّى عَلَيْهِمْ إِذَا مَاتُوا فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.481 - Hisham ibn Salim asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about whether the funeral prayer should be offered for one who drinks alcohol, commits adultery (zina), or steals if they pass away.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
